transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Were you able to buy the chemistry textbook?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: No, the campus bookstore was sold out, so I ordered a copy online.

choices.text: She borrowed the textbook from a friend.
She no longer needs the textbook.
She purchased the textbook on the Internet.
She plans to visit another campus.

questions.explanation: She says the bookstore had no copies available, so she ordered the book online.
questions.evidence: The campus bookstore was sold out, so I ordered a copy online.
